text: Technical Specification for Sub- critical Thermal Power Project - 2x(500MW or above) Main Plant Package Section- 9 (Mandatory Spares) 9 - 32 vii) Release valve for main trip valve 1 no. viii) Bellow for accumulators in governing system 1 set (set comprising of complete replacement in one TG unit) ix) Emergency governor 1 no. x) Gear for loading device (complete set consisting of 1set gear for loading device and its motor and all other fixing/assembly materials except housing) xi) Gear for startup device (complete set consisting of bushes, spring, 1set motor and all other fixing/assembly materials except housing) 9.2.10 Turbine Lubricating Oil System i) Shaft driven main oil pump (complete set consisting of 1 set impeller, shaft, key, impeller nut , wear rings, journal bearings, thrust bearing, coupling, shaf t sleeves, oil seals, ‘O’ rings as required for one pump) ii) Auxiliary oil pumps (set comprising of pump or pumps 1 set alongwith motor required to meet the 100% operational requirements of one TG unit) iii) DC emergency oil pump including motor (set comprising of 1 set pump or pumps alongwith motor required to meet the 100% operational requirement of one TG unit) iv) Jacking oil pump including motor (set comprising of pump 1 set or pumps alongwith motor required to meet the 100% operational requirements of one TG unit) v) Transfer oil pumps (set comprising of pump or pumps 1 set alongwith motor required to meet the 100% operational requirements of one TG unit) vi) Oil tank vapour extractors with motor (for each type and size) 1 set vii) Lube oil coolers (for each type and size) 2 sets Seals, gaskets, ‘O’ rings etc. viii) Duplex oil filters/ strainers (for each type and size) 2 sets (complete set consisting of cartridges, gaskets, ‘O’ rings except housing) Standard Technical Specification for Sub- critical Thermal Power Project - 2x(500MW or above) Main Plant Package Section- 9 (Mandatory Spares) 9 - 33 ix) Oil purifier a) Bearings including motor bearings 1 set b) Bag filters 4 sets c) Cartridge filters 4 sets d) Gaskets 2 sets e) Dust seats and ‘O’ rings for motors 2 sets 9.2.11 Turbine Control Fluid System i) Control fluid pumps including motor (set comprising of pump 1 set or pumps alongwith motor required to meet the 100% operational requirement of one TG unit) ii) Control fluid vapour exhauster with motor 1 set iii) Control fluid coolers’ seals,
